latin: De implicatione loquor. cum in navi sumus in medio mari, puella quicquid volumus faciet — propter implicationem. non est periculum verum, sed implicatio periculi.

questions.prompt: Where does the speaker say they would be?
questions.target: On a boat in the middle of the sea
choices: On a boat in the middle of the sea

questions.target: The suggestion of danger, not real danger
choices: The suggestion of danger, not real danger

translation: I'm talking about the implication. When we're on a boat in the middle of the sea, the girl will do whatever we want — because of the implication. There is no real danger, but the implication of danger.
